metadata.title: London Route Transfers - Professional Passenger Transport in London
metadata.description: Airport transfers, corporate transport, group and private travel in London. Reliable service with professional drivers.

airport.title: Airport Transfers
airport.desc: Meet & greet, flight tracking, luggage assistance.

corporate.title: Corporate Travel
corporate.desc: Transport for employees, clients and corporate events.

group.title: Group Transport
group.desc: Schools, tourists, corporate groups of any size.

private.title: Private Journeys
private.desc: Premium and business class vehicles on demand.

about.title: Reliable operator
about.text1: London Route Transfers organises passenger transport in London and beyond. We work with private clients, companies and groups.
about.text2: Every journey is managed as a controlled process — from receiving the request to completing the route.

cta.title: Request a callback — we will contact you to clarify the details

booking.title: Book a Transfer
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form and we will contact you to confirm your trip

form.consent: I consent to the processing of personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy
form.footerNote: We process personal data only for handling requests and organizing transport

success.title: Request accepted!
success.text: We will contact you during business hours to clarify the details of your trip.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passengers: Number of passengers must be at least 1
validation.consent: You must consent to data processing
validation.pastDate: Cannot book transfers for past dates

whyChooseUs.title: Why clients choose LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Private and corporate transport solutions
whyChooseUs.description: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS works with various client categories — from private customers to companies and organized groups. Our model adapts transport to client needs, ensuring service quality regardless of order scale.

clients.title: Who we serve
items: Private clients: individual trips, airport transfers, family routes, private events
Corporate clients: systematic transport for employees, guests, business meetings, events
Educational institutions: schools, colleges, universities organizing student trips
Tourist groups: tour operators, travel groups, trip organizers
Event organizers: weddings, private events, corporate outings

advantages.title: Why choose us
items: Registered UK company with long-term experience
Flexible operational model for different order types

transportTerms.title: Transport Terms and Conditions
transportTerms.intro: These Terms govern the provision of transport services by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.content: By ordering services, the client confirms agreement with these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Company Information
sections.content: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD, Private Limited Company, registered in England and Wales. Company Number: 00000000, VAT: GB 000000000, Address: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom.

sections.title: 3. Services
sections.content: Airport transfers, corporate transport, group transport, private journeys and event services.

sections.title: 4. Booking and Confirmation
sections.content: Client request is not a confirmed booking. Booking is confirmed only after all conditions are agreed upon.

sections.title: 5. Cancellation and Changes
sections.content: Cancellation or changes must be submitted in advance. Late cancellation may result in full or partial charge.

sections.title: 6. No-show
sections.content: If client doesn't show up at agreed time and place, the order is considered fulfilled with no refund.

sections.title: 7. Baggage
sections.content: Client must inform about baggage quantity and type in advance. Company is not liable for loss or damage.

sections.title: 8. Passenger Conduct
sections.content: Company reserves the right to refuse transport if passenger behavior poses a threat.

sections.title: 9. Subcontractors
sections.content: Company may engage third parties while remaining responsible to the client.

sections.title: 10. Liability
sections.content: Company is not liable for indirect losses or delays caused by traffic, weather or third parties.

sections.title: 11. Force Majeure
sections.content: Company is not liable for non-fulfillment due to circumstances beyond its control.

sections.title: 12. Applicable Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.
